abilities.name: Biotic Rifle
abilities.description: Long-range rifle that heals allies and damages enemies.

abilities.name: Zoom (ADS)
abilities.description: Hold to zoom in.

abilities.name: Sleep Dart
abilities.description: Fires a dart that puts an enemy to sleep.
abilities.duration: 0.5 seconds (sleep min) / 5 seconds (sleep max, non-tanks) / 3.5 seconds (sleep max, tanks) / 0.5 seconds (wakeup)

abilities.name: Biotic Grenade
abilities.description: Throws a grenade that heals and increases healing on allies, while damaging and preventing healing on enemies.

abilities.name: Nano Boost
abilities.description: Increases an ally's damage, while reducing damage taken.

minor.name: Groggy
minor.description: Enemies waking up from Sleep Dart are slowed and take 50 damage for 2 seconds.

minor.name: Speed Serum
minor.description: Nano Boost grants a 40% movement speed boost to both Ana and her target.

major.name: Headhunter
major.description: Biotic Rifle can crit enemies.

major.name: Biotic Bounce
major.description: After exploding, Biotic Grenade bounces and explodes again for 60 damage and healing.

abilities.name: Ignition
abilities.description: Hit enemies with fire attacks to burn them.
abilities.damage: 10 per second (base) / 20 per second (fan the flames)

abilities.name: Zhuque Fans
abilities.description: Hand fans that shoot fiery projectiles.

abilities.name: Fan the Flames
abilities.description: Hot wind blasts that amplifies burning damage.

abilities.name: Inferno Rush
abilities.description: Propel yourself forward and damage enemies you impact.

abilities.name: Dancing Blaze
abilities.description: Dodge all damage while striking nearby enemies, healing yourself for each enemy hit.
abilities.duration: 0.8 seconds (base) + 0.16s (bonus per target if base ends)

abilities.name: Vermillion Ascent
abilities.description: Charge forward, exploding on impact and instantly igniting enemies.

abilities.name: Vermillion Revival
abilities.description: When dead, revive yourself in a fiery explosion.

minor.name: Smoulder
minor.description: Ignited enemies burn 1.5 seconds longer.

minor.name: Heat Shield
minor.description: Gain 50 overhealth when you use your Ultimate and for each enemy ignited by it.

major.name: Short Fuse
major.description: Impacting an enemy with Inferno Rush reduces its cooldown by 1.5 seconds.

major.name: Hungering Blaze
major.description: Increase the healing of Dancing Blaze's subsequent strikes by 25.

abilities.name: The Viper
abilities.description: Semi-automatic rifle.
abilities.reload: 0.5 seconds (initial animation) / +0.25 seconds per bullet / 3.5 seconds (full reload animation)
abilities.dps: 136.5 while firing (63.86 overall w/ full reload, 34.78 w/ reload after each shot)

abilities.name: Take Aim (ADS)
abilities.description: Hold to zoom in, increasing damage and accuracy but slowing rate of fire.
abilities.reload: 0.5 seconds (initial animation) / +0.2 seconds per bullet / 2.9 seconds (full reload animation)
abilities.dps: 114.33 while firing (41.3 overall w/ full reload, 32.98 w/ reload after each shot)

abilities.name: Coach Gun
abilities.description: Blast enemies in front of you and knock yourself backwards.

abilities.name: Dynamite
abilities.description: Throw an explosive that detonates after a short delay or immediately when shot.
abilities.damage: 50 - 20 (explosion, enemy) / 100 over 5 seconds (burn, enemy) / 25 - 10 (explosion, self) / 50 over 5 seconds (burn, self)

abilities.name: B.O.B.
abilities.description: Deploy Bob. He charges forward and knocks enemies into the air, then attacks with his arm cannons.

minor.name: Remote Detonator
minor.description: After using Dynamite, pressing Ability 2 again causes it to explode after a 0.5 second delay.

minor.name: Double-Barreled
minor.description: Knocking an enemy back with Coach Gun briefly allows it to be used again with 25% reduced knockback.

major.name: Viper's Sting
major.description: Hitting 2 consecutive scoped shots on a target deals 25 extra damage and reloads 1 ammo.

major.name: Airburst
major.description: Dynamite has a 40% increased detonation radius while airborne and refunds 3 ammo when thrown.

abilities.name: Exo Boots
abilities.description: Hold crouch to jump higher.

abilities.name: Biotic Launcher
abilities.description: Three-round burst gun.

abilities.name: Biotic Launcher Alt Fire
abilities.description: Lob a healing projectile that heals all allies near the impact.

abilities.name: Regenerative Burst
abilities.description: Activate to heal yourself and nearby allies instantly, with additional healing over time. Instant heal is doubled for targets less than half health.
abilities.healing: 40 (instant, >50% max HP) / 80 (instant, <50% max HP) / 40 over 4 seconds (HoT)

abilities.name: Immortality Field
abilities.description: Toss a device that prevents allies from dying. The device can be destroyed.

abilities.name: Amplification Matrix
abilities.description: Project a matrix that doubles the damage and healing of allied projectiles.

minor.name: Assault Burst
minor.description: Regenerative Burst now provides Baptiste with 20% increased attack speed for 3 seconds.

minor.name: Expanded Field
minor.description: Immortality Field radius increased by 30%.

major.name: Automated Healing
major.description: Using any ability triggers Baptiste's Shoulder Turret, periodically firing up to 3 shots at allies, each restoring 25 health.

major.name: Rocket Boots
major.description: While airborne from Exo Boots, use (SPACE) to dash horizontally.

abilities.name: Ironclad
abilities.description: Reduces damage taken while transformed.

abilities.name: Configuration: Recon
abilities.description: Mobile, with a lightweight and highly accurate weapon.

abilities.name: A-36 Tactical Grenade
abilities.description: Fire a bomb that bounces off walls and explodes when it hits enemies or the ground.

abilities.name: Reconfigure
abilities.description: Switch between weapon configurations.

abilities.name: Configuration: Assault
abilities.description: A slow moving tank with a powerful rotary cannon.

abilities.name: Configuration: Artillery
abilities.description: Become immobile and fire up to three powerful artillery shells.
abilities.duration: 8 seconds (max targeting) / 1.25 seconds (impact delay) / 0.18 seconds (min between shots)

minor.name: Configuration Reload
minor.description: Reduce the cooldown of A-36 Tactical Grenade by 4 seconds when changing configurations.

minor.name: Armored Artillery
minor.description: Configuration: Artillery grants 300 temporary overhealth.

major.name: Lindholm Explosives
major.description: Configuration: Assault’s Weapon slowly fires explosive shells instead of a rotary cannon.

major.name: Self-Repair
major.description: Press E to rapidly heal yourself.

abilities.name: Inspire
abilities.description: Dealing damage to enemies heals nearby allies.

abilities.name: Rocket Flail
abilities.description: Melee weapon with extended range.

abilities.name: Barrier Shield
abilities.description: Hold to deploy a frontal energy barrier.

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.description: Available when Barrier Shield is deployed. Dash forward to knock back an enemy.

abilities.name: Whip Shot
abilities.description: Launch your flail forward to knock an enemy away from you.

abilities.name: Repair Pack
abilities.description: Heals an ally for a short duration.

abilities.name: Rally
abilities.description: Gain armor, empower Barrier Shield and provide extra health to nearby allies.

minor.name: Combat Medic
minor.description: Melee attacks reduce the cooldown of Repair Pack by 0.75 seconds.

minor.name: Morale Boost
minor.description: Inspire lasts 3 seconds longer when activated by Whip Shot.

major.name: Inspiring Strike
major.description: Shield Bash grants 30% increased movement speed for 2 seconds. Inspire's healing is instant when activated by Shield Bash.

major.name: Whiplash
major.description: Whip Shot's knockback can slam enemies into walls, dealing 50 extra damage.

abilities.name: Peacekeeper
abilities.description: Accurate, powerful revolver.

abilities.name: Fan the Hammer
abilities.description: Wildly fire remaining rounds.

abilities.name: Combat Roll
abilities.description: Roll in the direction you're moving to take reduced damage and reload.

abilities.name: Flashbang
abilities.description: Hinder enemies in front of you, slowing them and preventing them from using movement abilities.

abilities.name: Deadeye
abilities.description: Face off against your enemies. Press to lock on, then or to fire.
abilities.damage: 150 per second (during warning) / 300 per second (remaining duration)

minor.name: Bang Bang
minor.description: Cassidy throws a second Flashbang that travels farther, but both Flashbangs deal 40% reduced damage.

minor.name: Even the Odds
minor.description: Regenerate 30 health per second for each enemy targeted by Deadeye.

major.name: Rollin' Round-Up
major.description: Combat Roll also heals 15 health for each bullet reloaded.

major.name: Silver Bullet
major.description: Peacekeeper's secondary fire is replaced with a piercing shot that inflicts bleeding. Combat Roll and Deadeye reset its cooldown.

abilities.name: Reconstruction
abilities.description: Dealing damage from abilities restores shields.

abilities.name: Photon Magnum
abilities.description: Medium-range beam that culminates in a high impact shot.

abilities.name: Barrier Array
abilities.description: Construct a segmented barrier.

abilities.name: Sonic Repulsors
abilities.description: Push enemies back, stunning them if they hit a wall.

abilities.name: Crystal Charge
abilities.description: Project an explosive crystal and reactivate to detonate it.

abilities.name: Panopticon
abilities.description: Fire a hard-light barrier that imprisons enemies and detonates on expiration.
abilities.projectile_radius: 1.5 meters (globule) / 0.2 meters (direct hit damage) / 0.2 meters (matrix interaction)

minor.name: Efficient Design
minor.description: After using Barrier Array, restore 50 shields and activate passive health regeneration.

minor.name: Extended Power
minor.description: Increase the range of Photon Magnum by 20%.

major.name: Disruptive Detonation
major.description: Enemies hit by Crystal Charge's explosion are slowed by 30% for 2 seconds.

major.name: Power Move
major.description: Barrier Array can be used as a wall to stun enemies with Sonic Repulsors with a 100% damage increase.

abilities.name: The Best Defense...
abilities.description: Dealing damage with abilities creates temporary overhealth.

abilities.name: Hand Cannon
abilities.description: Short-range weapon with spread. Reloads automatically.
abilities.rate_of_fire: 3 volleys/s / 1.36 volleys/s (continuous fire of final shot)
abilities.dps: 73.3 while firing continuously, 165 burst from full ammo.

abilities.name: Rocket Punch
abilities.description: Hold to charge then release to launch forward and knock an enemy back. Damage increases if the enemy hits a wall.
abilities.damage: 25 - 75 (base, impact damage) / 10 - 40 (base, wall slam) / 38 - 113 (empowered, impact damage) / 15 - 60 (empowered, wall slam)
abilities.duration: 0.5 seconds (max. travel time) / 0.5 seconds (stun, punch impact) / 0.15 seconds (stun, wall slam) / 0.15 - 0.6 seconds (stun, empowered wall slam) / 20 seconds (Empowered Rocket Punch max duration)

abilities.name: Seismic Slam
abilities.description: Leap forward and smash the ground.

abilities.name: Power Block
abilities.description: Protect yourself from frontal attacks. Blocking heavy damage empowers Rocket Punch.

abilities.name: Meteor Strike
abilities.description: Press to leap up into the air. Move the targeting circle, then press to strike the targeted area.

minor.name: One-Two
minor.description: Hitting an enemy into a wall with Rocket Punch reloads all Hand Cannon and overfills ammo by 2.

minor.name: Survival of the Fittest
minor.description: The Best Defense grants 25 overhealth from eliminations and its max overhealth is increased by 50.

major.name: Aftershock
major.description: Enemies hit by Seismic Slam are slowed by 40% for 2 seconds.

major.name: Power Matrix
major.description: Power Block absorbs projectiles for the first second of its duration.

abilities.name: Eject!
abilities.description: Eject out of your mech when it's destroyed.

abilities.name: Fusion Cannons
abilities.description: Automatic short-range spread weapons.

abilities.name: Light Gun
abilities.description: Automatic weapon.

abilities.description: Launch a volley of explosive rockets.

abilities.description: Eject and overload your mech, causing it to explode after a short time.

minor.description: Eject grants 75 temporary overhealth and Call Mech's damage radius is increased by 50%.

minor.description: Hitting an enemy with Boosters deals 40% increased damage and extends the duration by 0.5 seconds.

major.description: Convert 150 health to shields. Defense Matrix restores shields based on 25% of its damage absorbed.

abilities.name: Bounty Hunting

abilities.description: Rapidly fire automatic bolts.

abilities.description: Medium range healing beam that consumes solar energy.

minor.description: Healing Pylon builds 300% faster and its cooldown is reduced by 1.5 seconds.

abilities.dps: 72 while firing (64.7 w/ reload) 288 while firing both guns simultaneously 303 w/ damage over time

abilities.name: Overrun
abilities.description: Charge forward to stomp and launch enemies. You are unstoppable while charging.
abilities.duration: 0.32 seconds (charge, min) / 2 seconds (charge, max) / 0.6 seconds (stomp) / 1 second (knockdown)

abilities.name: Cardiac Overdrive
abilities.description: Gain damage reduction and nearby allies heal themselves by dealing damage.
abilities.healing: 100% of damage dealt (self) / 50% of damage dealt (allies)

abilities.name: Cage Fight
abilities.description: Deploy a barrier that traps yourself and enemies. Automatically reloads Mauga's Chainguns at the start of the ultimate.

minor.name: Kinetic Bandolier
minor.description: Overrun reloads up to 150 ammo during the first second of charging.

minor.name: Pyromaniac
minor.description: Igniting enemies with Incendiary Chaingun grants 50 overhealth.

major.name: Firewalker
major.description: Overrun ignites enemies hit.

major.name: Combat Fuel
major.description: Critical hits grant Mauga 3 temporary overhealth on Cardiac Overdrive's next use, up to 150 overhealth.

abilities.name: Endothermic Blaster
abilities.description: Short-range spray weapon that slows enemies.

abilities.name: Icicle
abilities.description: Long-range icicle launcher.

abilities.name: Cryo-Freeze
abilities.description: Become invulnerable and heal yourself.
abilities.duration: 0.44 seconds min. duration / 4 seconds max. duration / 0.24 seconds recovery

abilities.name: Ice Wall
abilities.description: Create a wall in front of you.

abilities.name: Blizzard
abilities.description: Launch a weather control drone that freezes enemies in a wide area.

minor.name: Skating Rink
minor.description: Allies within Blizzard gain 25% increased movement speed and heal for 50 health per second.

minor.name: Glacial Propulsion
minor.description: Double jumping creates a small ice pillar that launches Mei into the air.

major.name: Deep Freeze
major.description: Continuously hitting enemies with primary fire freezes them for a short time.

major.name: Cryo-Storm
major.description: Cryo-Freeze slows and deals 70 damage per second to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Swift Recovery
abilities.description: Begin regenerating health more quickly.

abilities.name: Angelic Descent
abilities.description: Fall very slowly.

abilities.name: Caduceus Staff
abilities.description: Hold to heal an ally. Hold to increase an ally's damage inflicted.

abilities.name: Caduceus Blaster
abilities.description: Automatic weapon.

abilities.name: Guardian Angel
abilities.description: Fly towards an ally. While in flight, Jump launches you forward, and and Crouch launches you upward.

abilities.name: Resurrect
abilities.description: Revive a dead teammate.

abilities.name: Flash Heal
abilities.description: Heal Caduceus Staff's active target, healing is doubled on allies below half health.

abilities.name: Valkyrie
abilities.description: Gain the ability to fly. Abilities are enhanced.
abilities.range: 10 meters (chain healing) / +100% range (Guardian Angel, Caduceus Staff)

minor.name: Angelic Resurrection
minor.description: Mercy gains 100 overhealth after casting Resurrect.

minor.name: Divine Momentum
minor.description: Increases Mercy's travel speed by 15% after cancelling Guardian Angel.

major.name: Chain Boost
major.description: Secondary fire links to a second nearby ally.

major.name: Double Dose
major.description: Flash Heal gains an additional charge but its base healing is reduced by 10.

abilities.name: Remedy Aura
abilities.description: Heal nearby allies. Healing scales with resource generated by dealing damage and healing.

abilities.name: Spirit Glaive
abilities.description: Throw a spinning blade that impacts enemies and rapidly dealing damage.

abilities.name: Healing Kasa
abilities.description: Throw your hat to heal an ally, bouncing to nearby allies and healing you when it returns.
abilities.range: 30 meters (initial throw) / 12 meters (bounce range from target)

abilities.name: Katashiro Return
abilities.description: Leap forward, leaving behind a paper doll. Reactivate to return and gain increased movement speed while active.

abilities.name: Binding Chain
abilities.description: Launch a tethering chain that hinders the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: Kekkai Sanctuary
abilities.description: Create a sanctuary that heals allies and absorbs enemy projectiles from outside the area.

minor.name: Wellspring
minor.description: Remedy Aura resource generation increased by 25%.

minor.name: Exposed Soul
minor.description: Hitting an enemy with Binding Chain increases your damage dealt to them by 30% for 2 seconds.

major.name: Resonant Return
major.description: Healing Kasa bounces one additional time. Each bounce increases its healing by 10.

major.name: Quickstep
major.description: While Katashiro Return is active, allies within Remedy Aura gain 25% increased movement speed.

abilities.name: Biotic Grasp
abilities.description: Hold to heal all allies in front of you. Consumes biotic energy.

abilities.name: Biotic Grasp Alt Fire
abilities.description: Long range beam weapon. Damage dealt heals you and replenishes your biotic energy.

abilities.name: Fade
abilities.description: Disappear, move faster, and become invulnerable, but you cannot shoot.

abilities.name: Biotic Orb
abilities.description: Launch a bouncing sphere that either heals nearby allies or damages nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Coalescence
abilities.description: Fire a beam that heals allies and damages enemies.

minor.name: Destruction's Divide
minor.description: Coalescence can be toggled between pure healing or pure damage, with 30% greater effect.

minor.name: Ethical Nourishment
minor.description: Biotic Orb’s first 30 healing is instant on each ally it encounters.

major.name: Reversal
major.description: Reactivating Biotic Orb reverses its direction.

major.name: Phantom Step
major.description: Fade lasts 0.5 seconds longer and boosts jump height by 50%.

abilities.name: Augmented Fusion Driver
abilities.description: Automatic heat-based weapon.
abilities.reload: 3 seconds (cooldown after overheat) / 1.9 seconds (recharge from full heat)
abilities.dps: 140 while firing (99.42 overall w/ recharge, 86.84 w/ overheat)

abilities.name: Energy Javelin
abilities.description: Launch your javelin at an enemy to stun and knock them back. More effective if the enemy hits a wall.

abilities.name: Fortify
abilities.description: Gain temporary health, reducing all damage taken and becoming unstoppable.

abilities.name: Javelin Spin
abilities.description: Spin your javelin to destroy projectiles and block melee attacks, while also pushing enemies and increasing forward speed.

abilities.name: Terra Surge
abilities.description: Sweep in enemies and anchor down, gaining the effects of Fortify and charging up a surge of damage. Use Primary Fire to unleash the surge early.

minor.name: Defense Protocol
minor.description: Regenerate 100 health per second while charging Terra Surge.

minor.name: Mobile Fortification
minor.description: While Fortify is active, Orisa has no movement speed reduction and no heat generation.

major.name: Charged Javelin
major.description: Energy Javelin can be charged to increase projectile speed and knockback. Pierces enemies at full power.

major.name: Protective Barrier
major.description: Javelin Spin is replaced with a barrier.

abilities.name: Hover Jets
abilities.description: Hold to hover.
abilities.duration: Up to 2 seconds (continuous flight) / 0.3 seconds (energy regen delay)

abilities.name: Rocket Launcher
abilities.description: Long-range explosive projectile weapon.

abilities.name: Jet Dash
abilities.description: Boost horizontally.

abilities.name: Jump Jet
abilities.description: Fly rapidly upwards. Grants some fuel.

abilities.name: Concussive Blast
abilities.description: Launch an explosive blast to knock back enemies.

abilities.name: Barrage
abilities.description: Hover in place and launch a continuous volley of mini-rockets.

minor.name: Concussive Force
minor.description: Concussive Blast deals up to 50 explosion damage.

minor.name: Helix Shields
minor.description: Convert 125 health to shields. Direct hits with the Rocket Launcher triggers passive shield regeneration.

major.name: Fuel Stores
major.description: Jet Dash grants 50% fuel. Maximum overfuel is increased by 100%.

major.name: Rocket Salvo
major.description: After using a movement ability, the next primary fire shoots two spiraling mini-rockets, each dealing 40 damage.

abilities.name: Void Accelerator
abilities.description: Fire a stream of projectiles.

abilities.name: Void Barrier
abilities.description: Create a barrier at the targeted location.

abilities.name: Ravenous Vortex
abilities.description: Fire a sphere of energy that creates a slowing vortex on the ground, slowing and pulling down enemies. Re-activate to detonate early.

abilities.name: Nemesis Form
abilities.description: Transform into Nemesis Form, changing your attacks and gaining bonus armor.

abilities.name: Pummel
abilities.description: Punch, creating a wave of piercing energy with every swing.

abilities.name: Block
abilities.description: Significantly reduces damage taken from the front and reduces movement speed.

abilities.name: Annihilation
abilities.description: Enter Nemesis Form and create a deadly swarm that lashes out at nearby enemies, persisting longer when damaging enemies.

minor.name: Relentless Form
minor.description: While Nemesis Form is active, eliminations extend the duration by 1 second.

minor.name: Prolonged Barrier
minor.description: Void Barrier's duration and size is increased by 25%.

major.name: Nanite Repair
major.description: Ramattra is healed for 75 health per second while within Ravenous Vortex.

major.name: Void Surge
major.description: Void Accelerator periodically releases a burst of 6 additional projectiles during continuous fire.

abilities.name: The Reaping
abilities.description: Dealing damage heals you.

abilities.name: Hellfire Shotguns
abilities.description: Short-range spread weapons.

abilities.name: Dire Triggers
abilities.description: Use (RMB) to fire a volley with long range accuracy from both Hellfire shotguns.

abilities.name: Wraith Form
abilities.description: Move faster and become invulnerable, but you cannot shoot.

abilities.name: Shadow Step
abilities.description: Teleport to a targeted location.

abilities.name: Death Blossom
abilities.description: Damage all nearby enemies.

minor.name: Lingering Wraith
minor.description: Leaving Wraith Form grants 40% movement speed for 2 seconds.

minor.name: Soul Reaving
minor.description: Collect Soul Globes from dead enemies to restore 50 health.

major.name: Shadow Blink
major.description: Shadow Step's cast time and cooldown are 25% faster, but the range is reduced by 25%.

major.name: Trigger Finger
major.description: Refresh Dire Triggers' cooldown whenever using an ability or reloading.

abilities.name: Rocket Hammer
abilities.description: Devastating melee weapon.

abilities.name: Barrier Field
abilities.description: Hold to deploy a frontal energy barrier.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: Charge forward and smash an enemy against a wall.
abilities.duration: 3 seconds (charge, max) / 0.3 seconds (charge, min) / 0.65 seconds (stun on wall hit)

abilities.name: Fire Strike
abilities.description: Launch a fiery projectile.

abilities.name: Earthshatter
abilities.description: Knock down all enemies in front of you.

minor.name: Crusader's Fire
minor.description: Refund a charge of Fire Strike When you stun an enemy, overfilling up to 3.

minor.name: Crusader's Resolve
minor.description: While using Barrier Field, your passive health regeneration triggers 75% sooner.

major.name: Shield Slam
major.description: While Barrier Field is active, use Primary Fire to damage and knockback enemies.

major.name: Ignited Fury
major.description: For each enemy you hit with Fire Strike, gain 2 seconds of 25% increased attack speed.

abilities.name: Scrap Gun
abilities.description: Short-range spread weapon.

abilities.name: Scrap Gun Alt Fire
abilities.description: Medium-range projectile that explodes into the weapon's short-range primary fire.

abilities.name: Chain Hook
abilities.description: Drag a targeted enemy to you.
abilities.projectile_radius: 0.5 meters (vs enemy) / None (vs wall or barrier)

abilities.name: Take a Breather
abilities.description: Heal yourself and reduce damage taken.

abilities.name: Whole Hog
abilities.description: Damage and knock back enemies in front of you.

minor.name: Scrap Hook
minor.description: Chain Hook hits reload 2 ammo.

minor.description: Extend the range of Scrap Gun's secondary fire by 50% and tighten its burst spread by 25%.

major.name: Pulled Pork
major.description: Gain overhealth based on how far you pull enemies with Chain Hook, up to 300.

abilities.name: Helix Rifle
abilities.description: Automatic assault weapon. Shoots in a spiral pattern, gaining accuracy with sustained fire.

abilities.description: Marks an enemy. Helix Rifle shots automatically track marked enemies.

abilities.description: Launch an Anchor Drone. Reactivate to launch towards it.

abilities.description: Throw a charge that creates a shockwave on impact.

abilities.description: Deploy a drone that flies forward and drops explosives.

minor.name: Full Flight
minor.description: Increase Anchor Drone flight and grapple ranges by 25%.

minor.name: Tight Grip
minor.description: Helix Rifle's bullet spread tightens 100% faster and widens 30% slower.

major.name: Medi-Drone

major.name: Locked In
major.description: Firing Tracking Shot increases your attack speed by 20% for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Hyperspheres
abilities.description: Launch two charges which implode after a short duration, dealing damage in an area.

abilities.name: Experimental Barrier
abilities.description: Hold to propel a floating barrier; release to stop. Press again to recall the barrier to you.

abilities.name: Kinetic Grasp
abilities.description: Absorb projectiles in front of you and convert them into extra health.

abilities.name: Accretion
abilities.description: Gather a mass of debris and throw it at an enemy to knock them down.

abilities.description: Manipulate gravity to lift enemies into the air and slam them back down.
abilities.duration: 5 seconds (targeting) / 1 second (activation delay) / 2.5 seconds (lift) / 0.6 seconds (high gravity)

minor.description: Absorbing projectiles with Kinetic Grasp also reduces Accretion's cooldown.

minor.name: Hyper Regeneration
minor.description: 40% of Hyperspheres' damage restores Experimental Barrier's Health.

major.name: Hyper Strike
major.description: Every 5 direct hits with Hyperspheres, your next successful Quick Melee levitates and knocks away enemies.

major.name: Levitation
major.description: Activate and hold Double Jump to briefly levitate upward.

abilities.name: Railgun
abilities.description: Rapid firing projectiles that generate energy on hit.

abilities.description: High impact shot that consumes stored energy and pierces enemies.

abilities.description: Ground slide that can cancel into a high jump.

abilities.description: Launch an energy burst that deals damage to enemies within it.

abilities.description: Railgun energy auto-charges for a short duration.

minor.name: Deceleration Field
minor.description: Enemies hit by Disruptor Shot are slowed by 25%.

minor.name: Overcharged
minor.description: Railgun’s maximum energy is increased by 50 while Overclock is active.

major.name: Dual Thrusters
major.description: Power Slide gains an additional charge and its jump height shifts to lateral movement.

major.name: Friction Generators
major.description: While sliding, Power Slide generates up to 50 Energy.

abilities.name: Heavy Pulse Rifle
abilities.description: Automatic assault weapon.

abilities.name: Helix Rockets
abilities.description: Launch a volley of explosive rockets.

abilities.name: Sprint
abilities.description: Run faster while moving forward.

abilities.name: Biotic Field
abilities.description: Deploy a field that heals you and your allies.

abilities.name: Tactical Visor
abilities.description: Automatically aims your weapon at targets in view.

minor.name: Helix Propulsion
minor.description: Helix Rockets' projectile speed is increased by 50%.

minor.description: During Tactical Visor, Helix Rockets' cooldown is reduced by 80% and no longer interrupts firing Heavy Pulse Rifle.

major.name: Full Stride
major.description: Sprint's movement speed bonus gradually increases by an additional 25% over 2 seconds.

major.name: Stim Pack
major.description: Stim Pack replaces Biotic Field. On use, Soldier: 76 heals for 30 health per second and gains 20% increased attack speed for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Opportunist
abilities.description: You detect enemy ultimate abilities on nameplates, and deal more damage to hacked enemies.

abilities.name: Machine Pistol
abilities.description: Short-range automatic weapon.
abilities.dps: Damage per second: 160 while firing (114.3 overall w/reload) 192 while firing w/ opportunist

abilities.name: Hack
abilities.description: Hold to hack. Hacked enemies cannot use abilities and can be seen through walls. Hacked health packs spawn faster and can't be used by enemies. Taking damage interrupts the hack attempt.
abilities.duration: 8 seconds (reveal, heroes) / 1.0 seconds (ability disable, heroes) / 45 seconds (health packs) / 10 seconds (disable, objects) / 3 seconds (disable, B.O.B.)

abilities.name: Virus
abilities.description: Infect enemies with a projectile that deals damage over time. Virus damages hacked targets at a faster rate.

abilities.name: Translocator
abilities.description: Throw a beacon and teleport to it. Become stealthed for a short duration after teleporting.

abilities.name: EMP
abilities.description: Deal damage to all nearby enemies based on their current health, hacking them and destroying barriers around you.
abilities.duration: 8 seconds (reveal, heroes) / 3 seconds (ability disable, heroes) / 45 seconds (health packs) / 10 seconds (disable, objects)

minor.name: Encrypted Upload
minor.description: Hack can be used while invisible, successful hacks increase the duration of stealth by 3 seconds.

minor.name: CTRL ALT ESC
minor.description: Teleporting with Translocator while below half health initiates passive health regeneration.

major.name: High-Speed Bandwidth
major.description: Hacked health packs grant allies 25% movement speed and 50 overhealth for 4 seconds.

major.name: Viral Replication
major.description: Hitting a hacked enemy with Virus spreads Virus to enemies within 8 meters.

abilities.name: Photon Projector
abilities.description: Short-range beam weapon with increasing damage.

abilities.name: Photon Projector Alt Fire
abilities.description: Hold to charge, release to fire explosive orb.
abilities.damage: 5 - 100 (direct hit, min - max charge) / 2.5 - 50 (aoe at falloff start, min - max charge) / 2.5 - 12.5 (aoe at max radius, min - max charge)
abilities.radius: 0.5 meters (falloff start) / 0.5 - 2.0 meters (max radius, min - max charge)

abilities.name: Sentry Turret
abilities.description: Deploy a small turret that damages and slows enemies.

abilities.name: Teleporter
abilities.description: Create two temporary teleporters that enable instance travel between them.

minor.description: Sentry Turret gains an additional charge.

major.description: Teleporter gains the option to create a forward moving barrier instead. Pressing Ability 2 again slows down the barrier's movement.

major.name: Shield Battery
major.description: Symmetra regenerates 20 shields per second while within 10 meters of her teleporter.

abilities.name: Rivet Gun
abilities.description: Slow firing, long-ranged weapon.

abilities.name: Rivet Gun Alt Fire
abilities.description: Inaccurate but powerful short-range weapon.

abilities.name: Forge Hammer
abilities.description: Swing to repair your turret or damage an enemy.

abilities.description: Deploy a self-building turret.

abilities.name: Overload
abilities.description: Gain additional extra health as well as improved attack, movement, and reload speed.
abilities.rate_of_fire: Rivet Gun: 0.4 second recovery (primary fire) / Rivet Gun: 0.5 second recovery (alternate fire) / Forge Hammer: 0.6 second recovery

abilities.name: Molten Core
abilities.description: Create pools of molten slag that damage enemies. Deals additional damage to armor.
abilities.damage: 25 (impact) / 190 per second (pools, base) / +100 (pools, bonus against armor)
abilities.rate_of_fire: 1 ammo per 0.144 (if holding primary) / 1 ammo per 0.016 (manual rapid fire)

minor.description: Move 20% faster while Forge Hammer is equipped.

major.name: Anchor Bolts
major.description: Deploy Turret's throw range is increased by 50% and it can now attach to walls and ceilings.

abilities.name: Pulse Pistols
abilities.description: Short-range automatic weapons.

minor.description: Melee hits grant 20 ammo.

major.description: Recall grants 50 overhealth and 20 ammo that decays over time.

abilities.name: Onslaught
abilities.description: Strike enemies to increase movement and attack speed.

abilities.name: Palatine Fang
abilities.description: Hard-light greatsword. Combo swings to end with a destructive overhead slash.

abilities.description: Rush forward into a circular slash.

abilities.name: Soaring Slice

abilities.name: Sundering Blade
abilities.description: Cleave through most defenses, dealing severe damage to enemies in front of you.

major.name: Relentless
major.description: Onslaught can stack 3 more times, increasing attack speed by 5% and movement speed by 4% per stack.

major.name: Siphoning Strike
major.description: Overhead strikes gain 30% Lifesteal.

abilities.description: Quick melee deals more damage.

abilities.name: Explorer's Resolve

abilities.name: Smart Excavator

abilities.duration: 4 seconds (burrowed) / 0.2 seconds (emerging, min charge) / 0.65 seconds (emerging, max charge) / 1.3 seconds (emerging, max delay))

abilities.description: Energy grenade launcher.
abilities.dps: 55 while firing (0% charge) (40 overall w/reload) 110 while firing (100% charge (80 overall w/reload)

abilities.name: Particle Barrier
abilities.description: Create a damage barrier around you.

abilities.name: Projected Barrier
abilities.description: Create a damage barrier around an ally.

abilities.name: Graviton Surge
abilities.description: Launch a gravity well that pulls enemies to it.

minor.name: Spotter
minor.description: Projected Barrier activates ally health regeneration and increases their movement speed by 20%.

minor.name: Jump-Ups
minor.description: Secondary Fire's self-knockback is increased by 75%.

major.name: Energy Lance
major.description: Particle Cannon's beam pierces enemies.

major.name: Extra Oomph
major.description: While a Barrier is active, dealing damage with Particle Cannon’s beam generates energy.

abilities.name: Snap Kick
abilities.description: Quick melee damage increased by 50%, and its knockback is significantly increased.

abilities.name: Orb of Destruction
abilities.description: Energy projectile weapon.
abilities.dps: 125 while firing (108.7 overall w/reload) 156.25 while firing w/ discord

abilities.name: Orb of Destruction Alt Fire
abilities.description: Charge to release more projectiles.
abilities.rate_of_fire: 1 orb per 0.524 seconds (charging) / 1 shot per 0.144 seconds (firing) / 0.6 seconds recovery

abilities.name: Orb of Harmony
abilities.description: Launch this orb at an ally to heal them.

abilities.name: Orb of Discord
abilities.description: Launch this orb at an enemy to increase the damage they take.

abilities.name: Transcendence
abilities.description: Become invulnerable, move faster, and heal nearby allies.

minor.name: Discordant Repair
minor.description: Zenyatta gains 10% lifesteal against enemies affected by Discord Orb.

minor.name: Ascendance
minor.description: Activate and hold Double Jump to hover for up to 3 seconds.

major.name: Focused Destruction
major.description: Secondary fire charges 20% faster and can store 1 extra Orb of Destruction.

major.name: Dual Harmony
major.description: Gain a 2nd Harmony Orb but they both heal for 70% effectiveness.
